svg.text: Request 4: external LLR estimator scout
Post-MLRS hand-off ranking for the final weak-field posterior branch.
Decision
primary hand-off target = PEP (if code acquisition / build is feasible)
secondary path = collaboration or external-analysis-center route via JPL / POLAC-ELPN
request4 verdict = freeze MLRS as bounded observation-operator lab; hand off final weak-field posterior externally
Candidates
A · PEP (Planetary Ephemeris Program)

CfA / ASCL / PEP paper | full astrometric / ephemeris fit engine with LLR support | llr_fit=yes | public_code=public-code candidate; paper says source/docs/tests are publicly available via GitLab | effort=medium-high

Best external hand-off target found: it is described as an open-source general-purpose astrometric analysis program, its literature explicitly states lunar laser ranging support down to mm-class one-way precision, and ILRS literature shows it has already been used on real LLR data.
B · JPL Lunar Analysis Center / DE pipeline

JPL / ILRS | mature internal LLR analysis center workflow | llr_fit=yes | public_code=ephemerides and reader toolkits public; full fit engine not identified as public | effort=high or collaboration-only

Clearly mature and high-performing for LLR, but the public-facing assets are the DE ephemerides and access toolkits rather than a released end-to-end estimator. This is a credible collaboration / external-analysis route, not a drop-in public code hand-off.
B · POLAC / ELPN

Paris Observatory Lunar Analysis Center | mature lunar analysis-center ephemeris and fit workflow | llr_fit=yes | public_code=public analysis-center capability; no public code path identified in bounded scout | effort=high or collaboration-only

Strong science maturity and explicit use for LLR fundamental-physics fits, including variational equations and SME-style extensions, but the bounded scout did not identify a public code release suitable as a local estimator drop-in.
C · INPOP + CALCEPH

IMCCE | public ephemerides + open-source ephemeris access layer | llr_fit=not in public code found here | public_code=reader libraries public; fit engine not identified as public | effort=medium for ephemeris side, high for full posterior
Useful if the project needs a public ephemeris / residual-computation substrate, but the public assets found are the ephemeris products and CALCEPH readers, not a released full LLR estimator.
C · EPM / IAA RAS
IAA RAS | mature ephemeris and web residual service | llr_fit=yes internally | public_code=officially not distributed | effort=high or service-only

Scientifically mature and explicitly active in LLR residual analysis, but the official site states that the scientific software engine is not distributed, so this is not a local code hand-off candidate.
